title: Restore semantic-memory RCA UI as primary and layer misclassification overlays

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Addressing regression: restore semantic reinforcement memory topic hierarchy (with temporal/memory signals and exemplar drill-down) as primary RCA view. Keep misclassification breakdown/classification as overlay/augmentation rather than replacement hierarchy.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjustment: constrain pre-cluster misclassification rationale to a very short snippet so semantic-memory RCA remains driven by core evidence/topic signals, not triage prose.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented: pre-cluster triage rationale now hard-capped to 12 words and stored in pre_cluster_misclassification_rationale_short; reinforcement-memory input receives only the short signal while full item-level misclassification rationale remains available in downstream RCA synthesis and exemplar analysis.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Execution split into sub-tasks: plx-ad68bf (full-scope classification pass), plx-c2cb2d (agent-facing RCA payload contract), plx-f7a7ff (aggregate computation from full item set), plx-a93f09 (docs). Proceeding with code changes now.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented full-scope item classification for semantic RCA and agent-facing payload contract. Canonical field is misclassification_analysis.item_classifications_all with analysis_scope (topic_assignment_scope=exemplar_only). Removed duplicate item_classifications payload and switched dashboard consumption to item_classifications_all only. Runtime validation: evaluation a07da29f-f6cf-4025-89f6-cca701f0ef60 completed with max-samples=50; verified classified_items_total=29, item_classifications_all_count=29, and deterministic ordering. Note: a previous 100-sample run (7bb88656-a233-4501-b0b7-89570ef92c74) hit DynamoDB parameters size limits before these payload-shaping changes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented triage hardening: removed keyword-only category heuristics for information-gap/guideline-gap classification and now require LLM-extracted evidence flags for those categories. Mechanical classification remains strict structural/runtime based. Added regression tests ensuring keyword-only comments no longer change category without flags, while LLM flags still drive correct classification. Validation: pytest -q plexus/rca_analysis_test.py (19 passed) and pytest -q plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py (17 passed).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Committed and pushed triage hardening on branch feature/plx-f45a6b-data-flywheel-ops: 02b6ed3eb. Includes classifier logic update to require LLM evidence flags for information-gap/guideline-gap (keyword-only heuristics removed), plus test updates. Runtime validation evaluation: 9844d871-dec8-4ce5-b478-40a2451c1716 (50/50 processed, RCA completed).
